name: x402
context: x402 HTTP payment protocol — machine-to-machine crypto payments via 402 status codes
info: The x402 protocol enables AI agents and services to negotiate and execute crypto payments inline with HTTP requests. When a server returns HTTP 402 Payment Required, the x402 header contains payment details (amount, token, chain, recipient). The client agent constructs and signs the payment transaction, then retries the request with a payment proof header. Supports ERC-20 and native ETH payments across EVM chains.

scripts.name: Negotiate Payment
scripts.description: Parse a 402 response and construct payment parameters

max_amount.description: Maximum payment amount willing to pay

author: dojo-community
